name: aura-core
description: Aura-core with SkyGrid node bootstrap, validator telemetry, and Vercel-ready static landing deployment

scripts.prod: AURA_MODE=prod SKYGRID_TRACE=false SKYGRID_LEVEL=info NODE_ENV=production node app.js --network=skygrid-main --listen=0.0.0.0:7000 --max-peers=16 --heartbeat-interval=5000 --log-level=info
